MOREOVER, CONCURRENT DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF LLOYD W. SCHLOEGEL FILED BY BANK OF AMERICA NT&SA SUSTAINED FOR REASONS STATED IN THE MOVING PAPERS. SEE CCP 430.10(C). FURTHER THE ACTION IS ABATED AND PLAINTIFF IS ENJOINED FROM FILING FURTHER PLEADINGS IN THIS ACTION WITHOUT PRIOR WRITTEN LEAVE OF THIS COURT. (SEE LEADFORD V. LEADFORD (1992) 6 CAL. APP. 4TH 571.

ORDER SUSTAINING SUPERVISOR TONY HALL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND STAYING DISCOVERY. ORDER FILED BY PETER J. KEITH ATTORNEY FOR DEFENDANT TONY HALL. AFTER FULL CONSIDERATION OF THE PLEADINGS, THE COURT SUSTAINES THE DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE THE FACTS ALLEGED THEREIN ARE INSUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE VALID CAUSE OF ACTION CCP 430.10(E). PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE TEN DAYS TO FILE AND SERVE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING THE COURT ORDERS THAT ALL DISCOVERY BETWEEN SUPERVISOR HALL AND PLAINTIFF SHALL BE AND IS STAYED UNTIL THE COURT HOLDS A CONFERENCE TO DETERMINE APPROPRIATE DISCOVERY PROCEDURES AND THE COURT ORDERS OTHERWISE.
